SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
AdminController
Controller for the Admin screen.
Album
Represents an album belonging to a user.
Albums
The controller for the Albums screen.
AlbumView
Controller for the AlbumView screen.
LoginController
Controller for the login screen.
Photo
Represents a single photo in the Photos app.
Photos
Main class of the Photos app.
PhotoView
Controller for the photo viewer popup.
Search
The Search controller handles all searching operations in the application.
Session
A class used to stores information about the current user session in the Photos app.
Tag
Represents a tag applied to a photo.
User
Represents the user of the Photos app.
UserStorage
A static class that handles loading, storing, and managing user data for the Photos app.
